rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]>My collection is complete! It has every
creature, monster, material, treasure,
and piece of equipment.
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>It's basically the same thing as the
<Color=red>Hyrule Compendium<Color=white> you've got on your
Purah Pad—except mine's finished.
When you take a <Color=red>picture<Color=white> of these kinds
of subjects, they'll be <Color=red>registered in your
compendium<Color=white>.
I've got some mighty elusive entries in
my collection. You might find it a real
challenge to get them on your own...
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Say, I'll tell you what. I'll sell you
<Color=red>pictures <Color=white>that help fill out the gaps
in your compendium.

<unk[3:0:7]>当然，Me也不勉强。

<unk[3:0:7]>The <Color=red>Hyrule Compendium<Color=white> records all the
creatures, monsters, materials, treasure,
and equipment out there.
Your compendium is in your <Color=red>Purah Pad<Color=white>.
And that's where I keep my collection.

<Color=red><unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]><Color=white>If you take a picture of these subjects
with your <Color=red>camera<Color=white>, they'll be <Color=red>registered in
your compendium<Color=white>. Neat, right?

另外，You还可以用照相机<Color=red>自拍<Color=white>，
